3114360.name: ViruStream
3114360.description:
Warning.
This game is only in japanese language.sorry...

Distribution is OK! If you do, I will be too happy to go on a space trip.
But I would like you to put a spoiler warning in the title of the video.

-Please create a Twitter (X) or Youtube account in advance to be able to view these sites!

Also, if you play with too many people, you may soon
The game might end too soon.
Especially for distributors, if you get too many ideas and hints from listeners, the game
If you get too many hints and ideas from the listeners, the game will become a piece of cake. We will leave it up to you to decide the right balance there.
We will leave it up to you to decide.
About the game.
This game is inspired by a certain experiential mystery solving escape game,
Solve the riddles, get the keywords, and advance the story.
The game is a short riddle-solving puzzle game.

Game Outline

.Save the virus-infected game distribution site.
Time limit, 60 minutes. Solve the riddles that the hacker gives you,
　Solve the riddles that the hacker gives you and remove the virus!
Some problems are easy, some are difficult, and some are unreasonable. Some are easy, some are hard, and some are unreasonable.
　Use your brain and knowledge!
Please use your brain and knowledge!

Tips for advancing the game

.Check various places and gather information. Really, many places.
Share the screen with your friends to solve the riddles.

Things to prepare

.Paper, pen, or other notepad
Search tool (e.g. smart phone, for searching figures, tables, etc. to solve the problems)
